seoTitle: Oxley vs Oxley Flats — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Oxley and Oxley Flats. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Oxley vs Oxley Flats: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Oxley and Oxley Flats.
heading: Oxley vs Oxley Flats — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Oxley, Victoria and Oxley Flats, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Oxley has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Oxley Flats (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Oxley or Oxley Flats safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Oxley has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Oxley Flats scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Oxley scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Oxley Flats scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Oxley or Oxley Flats?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Oxley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
